items.title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
items.summary: The US is yet to formally confirm it has responded. However, Trump reportedly told Israel's Kan News it was unacceptable.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: 3 Dead in Hantavirus Outbreak Aboard Cruise Ship, W.H.O. Says
items.summary: One case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed in a laboratory, the organization said on Sunday. There are five additional suspected cases.

items.title: Entrepreneurs fight pile-up of garbage in the West Bank
items.summary: Israeli restrictions on movement in the West Bank are impeding garbage trucks from reaching landfills, leaving Palestinians living amid mounds of trash. Two Palestinian entrepre...
